description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Push that builds and uploads Marauder binaries for various targets. Trigger on push to master and on pull requests to master. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the repository, install dependencies, configure TFT_eSPI, and compile Marauder for Flipper Zero WiFi Dev Board, OG Marauder, Marauder v6, Marauder Kit, and Marauder Mini. Upload the resulting binaries as artifacts.
